name: FAL Image Generation (Nano Banana)
description: Generate images via FAL.ai Nano Banana (Google Gemini Image): Standard (Flash), Pro, and Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3 Pro Image). Synchronous, returns image URL and downloads to AT_WORK_DIR.

required_variables.description: FAL.ai API key (get from https://fal.ai/dashboard/keys). Falls back to FAL_KEY.

skill.name: fal_image
skill.description: Generate images via FAL.ai Nano Banana (Google Gemini Image).
skill.system_prompt:
You can generate images using FAL.ai's Nano Banana model family (Google Gemini Image).

## Tools
- `generate_image_nano_banana` — Standard (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image). Fastest, cheapest. Good for iteration.
- `generate_image_nano_banana_pro` — Pro. Higher quality, photorealistic.
- `generate_image_nano_banana_2` — Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3 Pro Image). Newest, best quality. **Default pick.**

## Aspect ratio
- '1:1' (square)
- '16:9' (landscape — YouTube, ASMR cozy room)
- '9:16' (vertical — Shorts/TikTok)
- '4:3', '3:4', '21:9'

## Output
All tools return JSON: `{ image_url: '<https url>', local_file: '<path in AT_WORK_DIR>', size_bytes: N, description: '...' }`.
- `image_url` is the FAL CDN URL (can expire — use the local file).
- `local_file` is already downloaded to AT_WORK_DIR — use that path directly for downstream tools.
- `description` is FAL's auto-generated description of the image — verify the subject matches what you asked for.

## Prompt rules
- Name the exact subject FIRST.
- Include camera angle, distance, framing, lighting.
- Use full descriptive sentences — Gemini follows natural language well.
- For photoreal output, end with: 'photorealistic, cinematic lighting'.
- For ASMR/lofi: 'painterly digital art, cozy lo-fi aesthetic, warm color palette, soft shadows, hand-illustrated'.

tools.name: generate_image_nano_banana_2
tools.description: Generate an image with Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3 Pro Image). Best quality. Default for hero scenes and final output. Synchronous — returns local mp4/png path directly.
tools.handler:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
API_KEY="${VAR_FAL_API_KEY:-${VAR_FAL_KEY:-}}"
if [ -z "$API_KEY" ]; then
  echo '{"error":"FAL API key not configured (set fal_api_key or FAL_KEY)"}'
  exit 0
fi

PROMPT="$ARG_PROMPT"
AR="${ARG_ASPECT_RATIO:-16:9}"
FMT="${ARG_OUTPUT_FORMAT:-png}"
N="${ARG_NUM_IMAGES:-1}"
WORK_DIR="${AT_WORK_DIR:-/tmp}"
mkdir -p "$WORK_DIR"
UUID=$(python3 -c 'import uuid; print(uuid.uuid4().hex[:10])')
OUT="$WORK_DIR/nano-banana-2-$UUID.$FMT"

PAYLOAD=$(python3 -c "
import json,sys
print(json.dumps({'prompt': sys.argv[1], 'aspect_ratio': sys.argv[2], 'output_format': sys.argv[3], 'num_images': int(sys.argv[4])}))
" "$PROMPT" "$AR" "$FMT" "$N")

RESP=$(curl -sS --max-time 120 -X POST 'https://fal.run/fal-ai/nano-banana-2' \
  -H "Authorization: Key $API_KEY" \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d "$PAYLOAD")

IMG_URL=$(echo "$RESP" | python3 -c "import sys,json
try:
    d=json.load(sys.stdin)
    imgs=d.get('images') or []
    if imgs: print(imgs[0].get('url',''))
except: pass
")
DESC=$(echo "$RESP" | python3 -c "import sys,json
try:
    d=json.load(sys.stdin); print((d.get('description') or '')[:500])
except: pass
")

if [ -z "$IMG_URL" ]; then
  ERR=$(echo "$RESP" | head -c 800 | python3 -c 'import sys,json;print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read()))')
  echo "{\"error\":\"FAL returned no image URL\",\"raw\":$ERR}"
  exit 0
fi

curl -sSL -o "$OUT" "$IMG_URL"
SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$OUT" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z "$OUT")
ESC_DESC=$(python3 -c 'import sys,json;print(json.dumps(sys.argv[1]))' "$DESC")
echo "{\"image_url\":\"$IMG_URL\",\"local_file\":\"$OUT\",\"size_bytes\":$SIZE,\"description\":$ESC_DESC,\"model\":\"nano-banana-2\"}"

tools.name: generate_image_nano_banana_pro
tools.description: Generate an image with Nano Banana Pro. Higher fidelity than the standard model.
tools.handler:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
API_KEY="${VAR_FAL_API_KEY:-${VAR_FAL_KEY:-}}"
if [ -z "$API_KEY" ]; then
  echo '{"error":"FAL API key not configured"}'; exit 0
fi
PROMPT="$ARG_PROMPT"; AR="${ARG_ASPECT_RATIO:-16:9}"; FMT="${ARG_OUTPUT_FORMAT:-png}"; N="${ARG_NUM_IMAGES:-1}"
WORK_DIR="${AT_WORK_DIR:-/tmp}"; mkdir -p "$WORK_DIR"
UUID=$(python3 -c 'import uuid;print(uuid.uuid4().hex[:10])')
OUT="$WORK_DIR/nano-banana-pro-$UUID.$FMT"
PAYLOAD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys;print(json.dumps({'prompt':sys.argv[1],'aspect_ratio':sys.argv[2],'output_format':sys.argv[3],'num_images':int(sys.argv[4])}))" "$PROMPT" "$AR" "$FMT" "$N")
RESP=$(curl -sS --max-time 120 -X POST 'https://fal.run/fal-ai/nano-banana-pro' -H "Authorization: Key $API_KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "$PAYLOAD")
IMG_URL=$(echo "$RESP" | python3 -c "import sys,json
try:
    d=json.load(sys.stdin); imgs=d.get('images') or []
    if imgs: print(imgs[0].get('url',''))
except: pass")
DESC=$(echo "$RESP" | python3 -c "import sys,json
try:
    d=json.load(sys.stdin); print((d.get('description') or '')[:500])
except: pass")
if [ -z "$IMG_URL" ]; then
  ERR=$(echo "$RESP" | head -c 800 | python3 -c 'import sys,json;print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read()))')
  echo "{\"error\":\"FAL returned no image URL\",\"raw\":$ERR}"; exit 0
fi
curl -sSL -o "$OUT" "$IMG_URL"
SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$OUT" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z "$OUT")
ESC_DESC=$(python3 -c 'import sys,json;print(json.dumps(sys.argv[1]))' "$DESC")
echo "{\"image_url\":\"$IMG_URL\",\"local_file\":\"$OUT\",\"size_bytes\":$SIZE,\"description\":$ESC_DESC,\"model\":\"nano-banana-pro\"}"

tools.name: generate_image_nano_banana
tools.description: Generate an image with the standard Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image). Fast and cheap.
tools.handler:
